event: Kitchen scene with abundant food preparation
description: A bustling kitchen scene showing two figures — a woman on the left and a man on the right — working amid an abundance of food. The table is piled with large cuts of meat, whole game animals (deer or boar), fish, poultry, and various foodstuffs. The woman appears to be butchering or preparing meat, while the man handles game near an ornate table or counter. The scene is set in an arched interior with a window visible in the background. The rendering emphasizes the textures and variety of the abundant food in rich, warm tones.
